surface.name: Daily room via cURL REST API then Prebuilt room URL
surface.selection_basis: Daily Prebuilt is the Start-here embed path once a room URL exists. Rooms can be created via dashboard or REST API; REST docs demonstrate cURL with Authorization Bearer to https://api.daily.co/v1/rooms. Prefer cURL room create, then open the returned url for Prebuilt.

alternatives_considered.name: Dashboard-only room create
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: Valid peer; cURL is documented for the same room create boundary.

entry_point.developer_intent: Create a Daily account, obtain an API key, create a room with cURL, and open the room URL.
assumed_prior_state: No Daily domain or API key exists.
A terminal with cURL is available.

documented_first_success.normalized_outcome: POST /rooms returns a room url and opening that URL loads the Daily Prebuilt call UI.
documented_first_success.observable_completion_signal: cURL returns JSON including url; visiting the url shows the Prebuilt video call interface.

boundary_evidence.official_label_or_terminal_state: Prebuilt guide requires a room URL from dashboard or REST API; REST create-room returns url; REST guide shows cURL Bearer auth.

documented_first_success.why_this_is_the_boundary: First meaningful Daily success is a joinable room. cURL creates the room without an SDK.

prerequisites.requirement: Daily API key for Authorization Bearer.

primary_path.action: Create or sign in to a Daily account and open the dashboard.
Copy a Daily API key from the dashboard.
primary_path.success_signal: Key value available for Authorization header.

details: Optional JSON body may set name/privacy; empty body creates a room with defaults.

primary_path.action: Open the returned room url in a browser.
primary_path.success_signal: Prebuilt call UI loads for the room.

friction_gates.description: API key required for REST room create.

sources.title: Embed video chat quickly with Daily Prebuilt
evidence_supported: Create room via dashboard or REST API
